understanding.goal_understanding: Place all selectable pieces (S) onto goal tiles (+) simultaneously. The level is won only when every + is occupied by a piece.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by 3-pixel grid steps. Walls (#) block movement, but some boundaries only block in certain directions. Pushable blocks (B) can be pushed if adjacent in the movement direction. CLICK is used to switch control to another selectable piece at its pixel coordinates, but only if the target piece is not blocked or the CLICK is valid. The CLICK action failed repeatedly, likely because the other piece was still at its start position and blocked from being selected, or because the target position requires an adjacent empty space to switch.

understanding.goal_understanding: Place all selectable pieces (S) onto goal tiles (+) simultaneously. The level is won only when every + is occupied by a piece.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by 3-pixel grid steps. Walls (#) block movement, but some boundaries only block in certain directions. Pushable blocks (B) can be pushed if adjacent in the movement direction. CLICK is used to switch control to another selectable piece at its pixel coordinates, but only if the target piece is not blocked or the CLICK is valid. The CLICK action failed repeatedly, likely because the other piece was still at its start position and blocked from being selected, or because the target position requires an adjacent empty space to switch.
